test_cases.description: Agricultural worker in greenhouse — magazine article on indoor farming economics, quiet melancholic register
test_cases.input_summary: Specific subject, editorial context provided, emotional register specified, documentary photographer aesthetic, 16:9 web article header
test_cases.output_summary: Prompt describes specific believable scene (hands adjusting root bundle, face in partial shadow); lighting is specific (diffuse light through polycarbonate panels); negative prompts actively exclude stock photo clichés; variation offers wider environmental shot; content note on AI + real people included

test_cases.description: Empty school classroom — editorial piece on declining enrollment in rural schools
test_cases.input_summary: No human subjects (environment-only), editorial context is social issue (education decline), melancholic absent-presence quality needed
test_cases.output_summary: Prompt correctly shifts to environmental storytelling (absence as subject); specific details added (small desks, faded alphabet wall chart, afternoon light through windows, one jacket on a hook); nothing generic; feels like a photojournalist image rather than stock

test_cases.description: Street interview in an urban market — documentary piece on informal economy
test_cases.input_summary: Two people in conversation, busy market background, documentary candid quality, global south urban context
test_cases.output_summary: Prompt describes specific market elements (stacked goods, overlapping stalls, ambient light); interaction framed as clearly spontaneous not posed; background density creates authenticity; limitation about Flux and complex multi-person scenes noted

notes: The most important quality differentiator is the specificity of the scene description — generic editorial prompts produce generic results. The skill consistently produces prompts with specific, believable details rather than categorical descriptions. The AI ethics note about using generated images in journalism is a necessary professionalism element.
